title: AppOpsService virtual device bypass all restrictions
notes: PARTIAL: Code-level design flaw confirmed (isOpRestrictedLocked returns false for non-default VD, skipping ALL restrictions). BUT: fake virtualDeviceId=12345 returns MODE_IGNORED — isValidVirtualDeviceId() blocks invalid IDs before reaching the bypass. VDM service exists on Pixel 10 so null-path bypass unavailable. Exploitation requires CREATE_VIRTUAL_DEVICE (signature perm) + CDM association. Normal third-party app cannot exploit. Design issue for VRP submission but low practical impact from untrusted app.
